[GC AI](https://gc.ai/) is a platform for in-house legal teams to research legal questions, review contracts, draft documents, and communicate legal guidance. More than 1,500 companies, including Zscaler, News Corp, and Nextdoor, use the platform. Claude powers the intelligence layer within GC AI's proprietary legal workflows, which combine company-specific playbooks, institutional knowledge, and a privileged setup made for in-house teams to generate research, contract summaries, issue spotting, and draft responses to internal legal questions.

## **With Claude, GC AI achieved:**

-   14 hours saved per week on average for in-house legal teams using the platform, based on a survey of more than 100 active customers
-   14% reduction in outside counsel spend, allowing teams to handle more work internally
-   21% greater accuracy on legal tasks compared to general-purpose AI tools without legal workflow structuring
-   Verifiable outputs through GC AI's Exact Quote feature, which links conclusions directly to source text
-   Complete legal citations surfaced through integrated search, connecting analysis to specific statutes, regulations, and official guidance
-   Integration into existing workflows through a Microsoft Word plug-in and Google Drive connectivity
-   Team-level consistency through shared playbooks and company-specific review criteria, allowing legal teams to use GC AI and supply standards across the legal function and for the company.
